start.speaker: npc_blacksmith_valdombra
start.text: Well met, traveler. The forge is hot and the roads are dangerous. What brings you to Valdombra?

passing.speaker: npc_blacksmith_valdombra
passing.text: Then keep your blade close. The woods east of here have grown unfriendly of late.

work.speaker: npc_blacksmith_valdombra
work.text: Hah! Bold. Come back when I have something worth your steel - I may yet have a task for you.
